def solve(lst, type1):
    # Split the list into two groups
    group1 = [x for x in lst if x % 2 == type1]
    group2 = [x for x in lst if x % 2 != type1]
    # Count inversions between group1 and group2
    inversion_count = 0
    for i in range(len(group1)):
        for j in range(i+1, len(group1)):
            if group1[i] > group1[j]:
                inversion_count +=1
    inversion_count1 = 0
    for i in range(len(group2)):
        for j in range(i+1, len(group2)):
            if group2[i] > group2[j]:
                inversion_count1 +=1
    return inversion_count == inversion_count1
